title: 猛特訓！　現れたキャロットマン！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: BONO! We have an emergency! Carrot Ranger is... is...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: COMING TO OUR EVENT RAAAACE!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow. So she's the special guest this year?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! And the winner gets to perform on stage
with her!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Graaaah! There's no way I'm gonna lose now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Good luck, Biko! ♪ I'll bake you a cake to help.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wait! Can you help me with practice before
that?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Sure! You want me to wear a mask and pretend
I'm Carrot Ranger, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I can't meet her without rehearsing first!
Thanks a lot!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger?
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now you bad guys should eat this cake
and get along, you hear?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hold on! That's what you would say! But Carrot Ranger would be like...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! Seems like you're in quite the bind, girls!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Th-that voice...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I, Seeking the Pearl, shall play the role of Carrot
Ranger for you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, really? I know you'll be great at it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Never fear! ♪ I shall show you all what the
world-renowned Carrot Ranger sounds like!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
That's right—'Tis I, Carrot Ranger! Nutritious!
Virtuous! Carotene Charge!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: C-CARROT RANGERRR!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Biko Pegasus! Thank you for all your
passionate support!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Me?! Y-you're a hero! Of course I'd cheer for you!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to performing with you! Now,
let me see you run like the wind!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You're looking forward to it?! Carrot Ranger is
gonna watch me race... ME?! Oh my gosh, oh my
gosh, oh my...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(Gah! I'm just rambling! Carrot Ranger is talking
to me and I can't even speak properly!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Wheeze... Why can't I do this?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: We made it! Over here, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, you want us to cheer on Biko from here?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! I want Biko to win too!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Ready... YOU CAN DO IT!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: (I can hear them. They're cheering for me!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(Biko Pegasus, get it together! You really want
them to see you like this?!)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
(No way! If I were Carrot Ranger... If I were a
hero...)

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I'd run with COUUUURAGE!

text_block_list.name: Carrot Ranger
text_block_list.text:
Ha, ha, ha! Well done! I can see by the way you
run that you have a heart of justice!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaaay! She saw me! Now I really know I'm going
to win my race!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: ...Good luck! You're gonna go far, Pegasus Girl! ♪
